title: The Ajmer Tenancy and Land Records Act, 1950
full_text: The Ajmer Tenancy and Land Records Act, 1950 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1950-42 Act Number: 42 Enactment Date: 1950-05-10 Act Year: 1950 Short Title: The Ajmer Tenancy and Land Records Act, 1950 Long Title: An Act to declare and amend the law relating to agricultural tenancies, record-of-rights and certain other matters in Ajmer. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 10-05-1950 Notification: By Chief Commissioner Notification Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Ajmer Tenancy and Land Records Act, 1950 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPER II PRIMARY RIGHTS CHAPTER III Niji jot CHAPTER IV CLASSES OF TENANTS CHAPTER V DEVOLUTION, TRANSFER, EXTINOTION, DIVISION, EXCHANGE AND ACQUISITION Devolution and transfer of tenancies Extinction of tenancies Division, exchange and acquisition of holdings CHAPTER VI GENERAL PROVISIONS RELATING TO TENANCIES Leases Declaration of rights Improvements Trees Surrender and abandonment CHAPTER VII PREMIA AND OTHER LEVIES CHAPTER VIII RENT AND ITS RECOVERY PART I.—Basic rent of tenants PART II—Payment and recovery of rent General provisions Arrears PART III.—Emergency provision PART IV.—Payment of revenue by biswadars to jagirdars and muafidars CHAPTER IX EJECTMENT OF TENANTS General Grounds of ejectment Remedies for wrongful ejectment Ejectment of person occupying land without title CHAPTER X COMPENSATION AND PENALTIES CHAPTER XI GRANTS CHAPTER XII PREPARATION OF RECORD-OF-RIGHTS AND DETERMINATION AND MODIFICATION OF RENT AND RENT-RATES PART I.—Preparation and maintenance of maps and records PART II. —Record and rent-rate operations and the appointment of officers Procedure in determining cash rent-rates PART III.—Commutation, abatement, enhancement, and determination of rent CHAPTER XIII EXTRAORDINARY AND EMERGENCY PROVISIONS CHAPTER XIV PROCEDURE AND JURISDICTION OF COURTS General provisions Subordination of courts Powers of courts and places for holding courts Confirmation of orders Review Revision Transfer of cases Question of proprietary right in revenue court Question of tenancy right in civil courts Conflict of jurisdiction CHAPTER XV MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS CHAPTER XVI POWER TO MAKE RULES CHAPTER XVII TRANSITIONAL PROVISIONS Section 1. Costs in revenue courts. Section 201. Power of revenue court to summon persons. Section 202. Mode of service of summons or notice. Section 203. Power to make rules. Section 204.
